[273:02]So that we can leave.

[274:35]you know, it's like Israel's causing all the wars. It's like Israel and the Emirates are

[274:40]revisionist powers that are overturning the existing order. Basically they favor chaos.

[274:47]They want chaos, instability, conflict, because weaker countries can pursue opportunities

[274:57]When there is chaos and conflict, that's when the Emirates can use its military and its intelligence

[275:04]and they can use their money to pay a mercenary army to go and plant a flag on the coast of the Red Sea,

[275:12]on the coast of the Gulf of Aden.

[275:15]And that is how they develop a colony. That is how they develop an overseas colony.

[275:22]And that is what Israel is doing. Israel can take land in Lebanon. Israel can take land
